content:wysiwyg_basic:11:69.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:11:69.html:
Stuff the Bus

There are hundreds, if not thousands, of children in the Winston-Salem area who cannot afford the basic school supplies. With your help, we can give them the supplies and the confidence to show up at school ready to learn!

Join us! 
Wednesday, July 30th from 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM 

Peters Creek Walmart
3475 Parkway Village Court
Winston-Salem

Needed Items:

  • Bookbags
  • notebooks
  • pencils
  • colored pencils
  • markers
  • crayons
  • glue sticks
  • scissors
  • erasers
  • pencil bags
  • 3-ring binders
  • loose-leaf paper
  • hand sanitizer

Donate
